title: Claude 4.8 Is A Beast… But There’s A Big Problem
summary: AI Revolution critiques Anthropic's Claude 4.8 launch, noting improvements in coding and agent tasks at the same price, but flagging a tension between claims of increased honesty and technical notes suggesting the model is optimizing better for evaluation performance. The video suggests this raises questions about model reliability despite strong benchmarks.
